'''dapïffïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tablemate|tablemate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tablemate|tablemate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| dapïffïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || dapïffïfth || dapïffïfj || dapïffïfsh || dapïffïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || dapïfpïffïfth || dapïfpïffïfj || dapïfpïffïfsh || dapïfpïffïf
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dapïffïfïf || dapïffïfïf || dapïffïfïf || dapïffïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || dapïffïfth || dapïffïfj || dapïffïfsh || dapïffïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dapïffïfïfl || dapïffïfïfl || dapïffïfïfl || dapïffïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dapïffïfïfïf || dapïffïfïfïf || dapïffïfïfïf || dapïffïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || dapïffïfïfn || dapïffïfïfn || dapïffïfïfn || dapïffïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dapïffïfïforo || dapïffïfïforo || dapïffïfïforo || dapïffïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|29134ca}}
